similar_features.invite_link_format: /groups/?join=<hex-nonce>&admin=<npub>&name=<groupName>; built by buildInviteUrl (app/src/lib/marmot/inviteLinkGeneration.ts:46); query-params, not path segments (static-export convention).
similar_features.groups_page_branch: app/pages/groups.tsx GroupsPage() (:899) branches on router.query: (1) join+admin+name all present -> returns <JoinRequestCard> full replacement (:941) before any list chrome; (2) ?id= -> <GroupDetailView> (:948); (3) else -> list view (:952-1039).
similar_features.current_landing: Returning user on an invite link sees a full-screen JoinRequestCard; after Request-to-Join only the join-request-sent success alert renders (JoinRequestCard.tsx:171). Existing groups never shown; awaiting group never shown.
similar_features.outbound_record: OutboundJoinRequestRecord {nonce, adminPubkeyHex, groupName, sentAt} persisted to IndexedDB store few-outbound-join-requests on successful sendJoinRequest; carries the display name already. Written by joinRequestSender; deleted by welcomeSubscription on correlated auto-accept. Never read by UI today. 7-day TTL, 256 cap.
similar_features.auto_accept: welcomeSubscription.ts:553 calls deleteOutboundJoinRequest(matchedRecord.nonce) after a correlated auto-accept join; the ONLY delete call site outside the module.

adjacent_done_epics.epic-group-invite-link-onboarding: DONE. Built name-gate on join card, requester-nickname transport in the gift-wrapped rumor, authenticated gift-wrap unwrap, outbound record + auto-accept. This feature builds on that backbone.
adjacent_done_epics.epic-first-visit-invite-welcome: DONE. Owns the FIRST-TIME-visitor welcome screen that intercepts /groups/?join=. This feature must preserve that interception and only change the returning-user branch.
adjacent_done_epics.epic-cancel-pending-invitations: DONE. Admin-side cancel of an in-tree pending member; provides the cancel-modal + testid-suffix-by-pubkey-prefix convention to mirror.

adr_constraints.ADR-002: mutual-contact-graph-and-pull-only-invitations governs the invitation model; this feature only surfaces the already-persisted outbound record and adds no push, so it is consistent.

architecture.reactive_precedents: app/src/lib/pendingInvitations.ts (:43-56 _snapshot/_listeners/_emit/subscribe/getSnapshot; :94-103 writeRaw single choke point notifies on every mutation; :205-210 eager sync snapshot init) and app/src/lib/unreadStore.ts (:45-56 same shape; :743 useUnreadCounts hook wrapper; :146-203 reconcileInit async-source-to-sync-store idiom).
architecture.idb_reactivity_gap: outboundJoinRequests.ts/joinRequestStorage.ts/inviteLinkStorage.ts are plain async idb-keyval CRUD with NO subscribe/emit. All mutations funnel through saveOutboundJoinRequest(:78) + deleteOutboundJoinRequest(:115) (clearAllOutboundJoinRequests(:124) is dead code). An emitter inside those two covers all cases incl. auto-accept delete for free.
architecture.idb_snapshot_risk: IDB has no synchronous initial snapshot (unlike localStorage), so getSnapshot() must return a cached array; populate via async load then _emit(). Need a not-yet-loaded vs loaded-empty distinction to avoid a one-frame false-empty flash.
architecture.hook_stability_risk: useSyncExternalStore requires a STABLE cached getSnapshot return (same reference until a real change). A hook returning a fresh object/array literal each render causes an infinite render loop (prior learning react-hook-returning-fresh-object-literal).
architecture.marmot_context: MarmotContext exposes groups/ready/unsupported/whenReady (MarmotContext.tsx:246-258); groups.tsx destructures {groups, ready, unsupported} (:907). New awaiting section guards on ready && !unsupported, rendered near PendingInvitations (:1004).
architecture.group_card: GroupCard.tsx takes {group}; Chakra LinkBox with theme tokens. No dimmed variant. Awaiting card is a DIFFERENT row shape (no group id/member-count/preview) -> own small component. UserCard.tsx:61-62,122 has a dimmed?:boolean (opacity 0.6) precedent.
architecture.styling: Chakra UI. Banner = Alert status="info" + AlertIcon + AlertDescription (groups.tsx:978-995,1006-1023). Awaiting badge = Badge colorScheme="warning" variant="subtle" (mirror MemberList requested badge :189-196), i18n-sourced.
architecture.distinct_sections: PendingInvitations = inbound Welcomes awaiting user's accept/decline. Outbound join requests = this device's requests awaiting a remote admin. Keep as visually distinct sections.

testing_and_conventions.unit: Vitest, app/tests/unit/**/*.test.ts, no jsdom/@testing-library. outboundJoinRequests.test.ts mocks idb-keyval with a Map-backed fake then await import()s the module. Reactive emitter test pattern from pendingInvitations.test.ts:145-155 (listener called once + getSnapshot reflects) and :298-314 (unsubscribe silences).
testing_and_conventions.react_logic_testing: Test React/hook logic via extracted pure functions + source-scan (no jsdom). Prior learnings: extract-pure-helpers-ts-when-vitest, vitest-env-has-no-jsdom-testing, react-watcher-pure-function-export-lets.
testing_and_conventions.i18n: Copy is one shared TS interface -> a missing EN/DE key is a compile error. Per-feature i18n test asserts exact EN+DE strings (pendingInvitations.i18n.test.ts). Add a nested block under groups.* (dynamic values as functions, e.g. (name:string)=>string).

e2e.framework: Playwright, app/tests/e2e/*.spec.ts. Bucket by FILENAME glob: must be named groups-* to run in the relay bucket (trap: e2e_bucket_naming_relay_trap).
e2e.publish_via_app: Drive publishes through the running app (second browser.newContext(), sign in via addInitScript, interact through real UI). Never raw WebSocket.
e2e.mirror_specs: Best: groups-invite-link.spec.ts (two-context generate-link -> join-request -> approve, both named and name-gated). Live-update: groups-join-request-live.spec.ts (assert without goto/reload). Cancel pattern: groups-cancel-pending.spec.ts (cancel-<prefix> -> cancel-<prefix>-confirm testids).
e2e.existing_testids: join-request-card, join-request-name-gate, join-request-name-input, join-request-send-btn, join-request-sent, join-request-already-member, pending-request-row-*, approve-request-*, groups-list, group-card-*.
e2e.new_testids_needed: awaiting banner (e.g. awaiting-confirmation-banner), awaiting card (e.g. groups-awaiting-card-<prefix>), cancel action (e.g. cancel-outbound-request-<prefix>).
e2e.e2e_hazards: Trailing-slash URL matching after router.replace (learnings next-js-static-export-trailing-slash, ac-prescribing-url-regex-must-name). Gate on rendered readiness markers not fixed timeouts (mls-over-relay-playwright-e2e-must). Do NOT close the invitee context mid-test (destroys MLS KeyPackage: closing-playwright-browsercontext-destroys). Poll live-updating UI, don't reload (e2e_no_reload_poll_for_propagation).

testing_and_conventions.make_targets: make test-unit (vitest); make test-e2e-all (full 60-test gate = fast + relay buckets); make test (unit + e2e-all, definitive gate). Subsets (test-e2e-fast/groups) are dev aids, never a pass.

prior_learnings: react-hook-returning-fresh-object-literal — stable cached snapshot required or infinite loop
extract-pure-helpers-ts-when-vitest / vitest-env-has-no-jsdom-testing — test via pure functions
welcome-join-request-name-gate-must — reuse isWelcomeJoinRequestDisabled predicate on the visible field
mls-over-relay-playwright-e2e-must — readiness markers not fixed timeouts
chakra-ui-modal-does-not-forward — data-testid not forwarded to Modal DOM node
